description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a low-pitched, dark gray hip roof and a clean, rectangular footprint. The front facade features a double garage with a wide driveway, a main entrance door, and a series of vertical slit windows that add a contemporary touch. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray or white color, contrasting with the darker roof. The property is surrounded by a neatly manicured lawn and paved walkways, with a small set of signage or display boards near the front. The rear and side elevations show additional windows, but the window arrangement is asymmetrical, emphasizing privacy and modern design. The overall structure is spacious, with a large paved area in front and a simple, functional layout.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, light exterior walls, double garage, and asymmetrical vertical windows, set on a manicured lawn with paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, vertical slit windows, and signage near the driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, the hip roof, and the absence of windows on the garage side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows and the expansive lawn area behind the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more vertical slit windows and the continuation of the paved walkway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with vertical slit windows on front and side facades
